name: edit_room_image
description: Apply a single visual edit to the room photo currently on screen — remove an object (sofa, lamp, bookcase), replace one, or render a new item (e.g. a floor lamp in a given style). Call this whenever the user asks to change how the room LOOKS. The current photo is supplied by the app automatically; you only provide the edit instruction. The edited image is shown to the user and added to the conversation. The tool RETURNS a plain-text description of what the room looks like after the edit — read it and base your critique on it, because it reflects the real result, not your assumptions.

instruction.description: A concise, self-contained description of the single edit to make to the current room photo, phrased as an imperative. Examples: 'Remove the sofa, keeping everything else identical.' 'Add a sleek modern brass floor lamp in the corner.'
